description: Manually labeled critical functions for the dashboard codebase
labeling_criteria: High dependent count (called by many functions)
Entry points (API routes, CLI commands, top-level React components)

labeling_rationale.scanCurrentElements: Complexity: 101, LOC: 521 - Main scanner entry point
labeling_rationale.buildDependencyGraph: Core pipeline orchestrator for graph construction
labeling_rationale.generateContext: Core pipeline orchestrator for context.md generation
labeling_rationale.detectPatterns: Core pipeline orchestrator for pattern detection
labeling_rationale.analyzeCoverage: Core pipeline orchestrator for coverage analysis
labeling_rationale.saveIndex: Core pipeline orchestrator for index persistence
labeling_rationale.createErrorResponse: Dependents: 151 - Most depended-on function in codebase

notes: This ground truth is subjective - critical depends on project goals
Prioritize functions that appear in multiple workflows
Include both high-level orchestrators and frequently-called utilities
Exclude test helpers, mock functions, and scaffolding code
